working_on.task: Generated and reviewed Use Case documentation and diagrams for the Instructor module.
working_on.notes: Created 8 Use Cases for Instructor (Course Draft, Update, Publish, Sections, Video/Article/Quiz Lessons, Interactive Quiz). Clarified UML syntax (avoiding <<include>> for grouping and using Boundary Boxes/Packages instead). Exported Mermaid diagram.

recent_changes.description: Created SQL seed scripts for testing enrollments (INSERT INTO enrollments)
Interactive Video Quiz with timeupdate event and exitFullscreen bugfix

errors_encountered.error: Misunderstanding of Git Contributors vs Collaborators
errors_encountered.solution: GitHub counts anyone in commit history as contributor. Verified no user named 'Chiến' in git log, likely old codebase remnant.

decisions_made.decision: Keep Git history intact for grading
decisions_made.reason: Teachers grade based on commits. Plan B (new repo + copy files) formulated as fallback if teacher objects.

decisions_made.decision: Use direct SQL INSERT for enrollment testing
decisions_made.reason: Faster than building full purchase flow. Seed data directly into enrollments table with student_id and course_id.
